description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a unique sliding design that reveals a physical QWERTY keyboard beneath the main touchscreen. The phone's body is primarily blue with a black front face, and the screen displays a messaging interface with images and a virtual keyboard. The physical keyboard is compact, featuring small, raised keys with white lettering, and is housed in a sliding tray that extends from the bottom of the device. The phone has rounded corners and a slim profile, with a visible charging port at the bottom edge. The overall design suggests a blend of touchscreen and tactile input, reminiscent of early smartphone models that combined both input methods.
description: A blue, slim mobile phone with a sliding physical QWERTY keyboard beneath a touchscreen displaying a messaging app. The device features a modern design with both virtual and physical input options.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen with a messaging interface and the top of the physical keyboard just visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the extended sliding keyboard beneath the main body.
description_view_2: Direct view of the physical QWERTY keyboard fully extended below the touchscreen, with the charging port visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sliding mechanism and the keyboard's extension from the main phone body.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a messaging application with a virtual keyboard, two image thumbnails, and a dark interface theme. The top bar shows typical app icons and text input fields.
attribute_camera_placement: No visible camera modules or lenses are apparent from the provided views.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible on the edges or front of the device in the provided views.
